queries.question: Give me all pension plan clients and brokerage account clients getting a return of 5%.
queries.sql:
SELECT Clients.FullName
FROM Pensions JOIN Clients ON Clients.ClientID = Pensions.ClientID
WHERE (Pensions.Retirement_Savings = "Pension Plan" OR Pensions.Retirement_Savings = "Brokerage Account") AND Pensions.Rate_of_return = "5%"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?pensions a :Pensions .
  ?clients a :Clients .
  ?pensions p:hasClients ?clients .
  ?clients p:name ?fullname .
  ?pensions p:Retirement_Savings ?retirement_savings_w .
  ?pensions p:Retirement_Savings ?retirement_savings_w2 .
  ?pensions p:Rate_of_return ?rate_of_return_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?retirement_savings_w) = "Pension Plan" || STR(?retirement_savings_w2) = "Brokerage Account")) && STR(?rate_of_return_w) = "5%"))
}
